reviews.review_description: Very cool idea, and it was executed perfectly. I feel like a cool thing to add would be more steps to the forging, like melting down the ores, making the weapon, and cooling it in water. It would also be cool if we each had our own “houses” where we spawn, can forge, and store our items. That way no one can just hog the table. It could be like an area with a barrier that only you can go through unless you give someone permission by clicking a button or something. I also think an option to turn off PvP even when your sword is drawn

I'm sorry guys but this games tutorial is buns i literally cant get past it because the game keeps flashing

developer_response.body:
Hey, thank you for reporting this. We know this black flashing issue is real, but we have not been able to reproduce it on our own devices yet. We tried a few fixes, but it still seems to happen for some players.

If you are down to help us debug it, please join our Discord and DM Xuande. We can test it with you and figure out what is going on with your Quest.

Discord: https://discord.gg/soulforge

If your help leads us to the fix, we will send you some Soul Coins as a thank you. It would seriously help us a lot, and we would really appreciate it.

It is unplayable trash and when every some one asks about the tutorial the devs say go to the discord, we shouldn’t have to do all of that just to play a game and I have been stuck for 4 hours on the tutorial and don’t hit us with the “we are working on making it better” stuff that you have been saying for 2 months

developer_response.body:
Hey, really sorry about the frustration.

We just released Part 1 & 2 of the new tutorial, and most players are finding it much easier to understand and follow now.

If you got stuck at any point, feel free to let us know on Discord. We’re a small team still learning and improving, but your feedback genuinely helps us make the game better.

reviews.review_title: Bruh give me back my lightsaber
reviews.review_description: When i put my lightsaber on the left of the storage where you check it's stats my friend opened it and then it disappeared please give me it back it was a lv 10 white lightsaber

developer_response.body:
Hey! Your items are usually bound to your account, so if this was a session bug, it should show up again next time you log in.

If it’s still missing, please reach out to us on Discord and we’ll help you restore it or compensate you.

Also, if this gets resolved, we’d really appreciate it if you could consider updating your review — it helps us a lot.
